since_last: 30% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.00%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.64% · BTC -2.03% · Gold +0.26% · Nasdaq100 -2.26%. 30% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.00%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.00%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.72%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +5.35%, WDAY +4.61%, SAP +2.55%, CRM +2.54%, INTU +2.50%. Laggards: TER -12.72%, AMAT -10.54%, AMBA -10.52%, INTC -10.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.77% at $151.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
